project_type: Python CLI + PySide6 desktop GUI app for Salesforce translation workflow
build_system: setuptools with pyproject.toml, editable install via pip install -e '.[gui,dev]'
test_framework: pytest with fixtures in tests/conftest.py, Typer CliRunner for CLI tests, QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen for GUI tests
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest -q to verify all tests pass. 2. Run QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/gui/ for GUI tests.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 default. PySide6 available for GUI tests with QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: frozen dataclasses for data models, dataclasses for results, Typer for CLI commands, Rich for CLI output, PySide6 for GUI. Tests in tests/ directory following existing naming conventions.
key_patterns: Entry is a frozen dataclass (key, label, translation). Document holds entries list. ValidationReport has issues list with by_category() grouping. CLI uses typer.Typer app with Rich console output. GUI pages extend PhasePage base class. Excel import/export uses openpyxl. CLI tests use CliRunner from typer.testing.
directory_structure: src/stx/ - main package; src/stx/gui/ - desktop GUI with pages/ for each phase; src/stx/excel/ - Excel I/O; src/stx/stf/ - STF parser/writer; src/stx/translate/ - translation backends; tests/ - pytest tests
